org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.globals

Class Constants.SteeringTuning

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.globals.Constants.SteeringTuning
  • Enclosing class:
    Constants

    public static class Constants.SteeringTuning
extends java.lang.Object
    Steering PID tuning parameters. These constants control the automatic steering servo tuning process.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static double D_INCREMENT
      D gain increment per step
      static double D_MAX
      Maximum D gain to test
      static double D_START
      Starting D gain for steering
      static double I_INCREMENT
      I gain increment per step
      static double I_MAX
      Maximum I gain to test
      static double I_START
      Starting I gain for steering
      static double KS_INCREMENT
      kS increment for feedforward tuning
      static double KS_MAX_POWER
      Maximum power to test for kS
      static double KS_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD
      Velocity threshold for kS detection (in/s)
      static double MAX_TOTAL_TUNING_TIME
      Maximum total tuning time (seconds)
      static double MAX_VELOCITY_TEST_TIME
      Maximum time to wait for velocity response (seconds)
      static java.lang.String[] MODULE_NAMES
      Module names for display during tuning
      static double OVERSHOOT_THRESHOLD
      Threshold for detecting overshoot (radians)
      static double P_INCREMENT
      P gain increment per step
      static double P_MAX
      Maximum P gain to test
      static double P_START
      Starting P gain for steering
      static double SETTLING_TIME_THRESHOLD
      Maximum time for settling (seconds)
      static double STEADY_STATE_ERROR_THRESHOLD
      Error threshold for steady state detection (radians)
      static double STEP_ANGLE
      Angle step for step response test
      static double VELOCITY_TEST_ANGLE
      Angle to test for velocity response (90 degrees)
